page: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v4 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the EDSv4 family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz, configured with 1 physical core, 2 threads per core, and 2 vCPUs. The server is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per core. It includes 154 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, with zero GPUs.

Benchmark data reveals a divergence between single-core and multi-core performance. The server achieves average results in single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance, Geekbench single-core score, and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression. However, multi-core and multi-threaded operations, including stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench multi-core score, fall into the bottom 10% tier. Memory bandwidth for both read and write operations on large blocks is also in the bottom 10%, though the PassMark memory score registers in the middle 50% average tier.

Due to its high memory allocation relative to its 2 vCPUs, the server offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high parallel compute power. However, database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput perform in the bottom 10%, indicating a performance tradeoff for high-throughput transactional systems. This server is best suited for memory-bound, single-threaded processing tasks, lightweight caching, or development environments requiring a large memory footprint without intensive multi-core computational demands.
description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v4 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the EDSv4 family, powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 2 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of memory, and 154 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. Benchmarks show average performance in single-core and single-threaded tasks, such as Geekbench single-core and gzip compression. However, multi-core compute, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall into the bottom 10% tier. This resource profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads with low parallel processing requirements. The server is suited for memory-bound, single-threaded applications, lightweight caching, and development environments requiring a high memory-to-vCPU ratio.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v4 is a memory-optimized server featuring 2 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, delivering average single-core performance but limited multi-core capability.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v4 is an Intel-based memory-optimized server with 2 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage for memory-bound workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual server featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and local storage for memory-intensive, single-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 2 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of memory
154 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Average single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
Lower-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth limits
Suited for memory-bound, single-threaded workloads and lightweight caching
